name: getNavStarsMarks
description: Returns whether markers for navigational stars are displayed on the sky. Navigational stars are the 58 stars used in celestial navigation from The Nautical Almanac.
returnDescription: true if navigational star markers are visible, false if hidden

name: setNavStarsMarks
description: Shows or hides markers for navigational stars on the sky.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show navigational star markers, false to hide

name: navStarsVisible
description: Property that controls whether navigational star markers are displayed.
example:
var visible = core.getStelProperty('NavStars.navStarsVisible');
core.setStelProperty('NavStars.navStarsVisible', true);

name: getCurrentNavigationalStarsSet
description: Returns the currently selected set of navigational stars. Values: 0=AngloAmerican, 1=French, 2=British, 3=Wrinkles, 4=Russian, 5=USSRAvia, 6=USSRSpace, 7=German, 8=GeminiAPS, 9=MeadeLX200, 10=MeadeETX, 11=MeadeAS494, 12=MeadeAS497, 13=CelestronNS, 14=Apollo, 15=SkywatcherSS, 16=VixenSB, 17=ArgoNavis, 18=OrionIS, 19=SkyCommander.

name: setCurrentNavigationalStarsSet
description: Sets the current set of navigational stars. Use values 0-19 corresponding to different star lists.

name: getCurrentNavigationalStarsSetKey
description: Returns the key name of the current navigational stars set.
example:
var key = NavStars.getCurrentNavigationalStarsSetKey();
core.debug("Current star set: " + key);

name: setCurrentNavigationalStarsSetKey
description: Sets the current navigational stars set by its key name.
example: NavStars.setCurrentNavigationalStarsSetKey("Apollo");

name: getCurrentNavigationalStarsSetDescription
description: Returns a human-readable description of the current navigational stars set.
returnDescription: Description of the current star set
example:
var desc = NavStars.getCurrentNavigationalStarsSetDescription();
core.debug("Star set: " + desc);

name: getEnableAtStartup
description: Returns whether the Navigational Stars plugin will be automatically enabled when Stellarium starts.
returnDescription: true if enabled at startup, false otherwise

name: setEnableAtStartup
description: Sets whether the Navigational Stars plugin should be automatically enabled when Stellarium starts.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable at startup, false to disable

name: displayAtStartup
description: Property that controls whether the plugin is enabled at startup.
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.displayAtStartup', true);

name: getHighlightWhenVisible
description: Returns whether navigational stars are highlighted when they are visible above the horizon.
returnDescription: true if highlighting is enabled, false otherwise

name: setHighlightWhenVisible
description: Sets whether navigational stars should be highlighted when they are above the horizon.

parameters.name: highlight
parameters.description: true to highlight visible stars, false to use normal appearance

name: highlightWhenVisible
description: Property that controls whether visible navigational stars are highlighted.
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.highlightWhenVisible', true);

name: getLimitInfoToNavStars
description: Returns whether extra information (altitude, azimuth, GHA, etc.) is displayed only for navigational stars and specific celestial bodies.
returnDescription: true if info is limited to navigational stars, false for all objects

name: setLimitInfoToNavStars
description: Sets whether extra information (altitude, azimuth, GHA, SHA, etc.) should be displayed only for navigational stars and specific celestial bodies (Sun, Moon, planets except Mercury).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: true to limit info to navigational stars, false for all objects

name: limitInfoToNavStars
description: Property that controls whether extra info is limited to navigational stars.
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.limitInfoToNavStars', true);

name: getUpperLimb
description: Returns whether calculations for the Moon use the upper limb instead of the center.
returnDescription: true if using upper limb, false if using center

name: setUpperLimb
description: Sets whether calculations for the Moon should use the upper limb instead of the center.

parameters.name: upperLimb
parameters.description: true to use upper limb, false to use center

name: upperLimb
description: Property that controls whether Moon calculations use the upper limb.
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.upperLimb', true);

name: getTabulatedDisplay
description: Returns whether extra information is displayed in tabulated format (like Nautical Almanac) rather than paired lines.
returnDescription: true if using tabulated format, false if using paired lines

name: setTabulatedDisplay
description: Sets whether extra information should be displayed in tabulated format (like Nautical Almanac) or as paired lines.

parameters.name: tabulated
parameters.description: true for tabulated format, false for paired lines

name: tabulatedDisplay
description: Property that controls whether information is displayed in tabulated format.
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.tabulatedDisplay', true);

name: getShowExtraDecimals
description: Returns whether extra decimal places are shown in navigational calculations (more precision).
returnDescription: true if extra decimals are shown, false for standard precision

name: setShowExtraDecimals
description: Sets whether extra decimal places should be shown in navigational calculations for higher precision.

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: true to show extra decimals, false for standard precision

name: showExtraDecimals
description: Property that controls whether extra decimals are shown in calculations.
returnDescription: true if extra decimals are shown
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.showExtraDecimals', true);

name: getFlagUseUTCTime
description: Returns whether UTC time is used for navigational calculations instead of local time.
returnDescription: true if using UTC time, false if using local time

name: setFlagUseUTCTime
description: Sets whether UTC time should be used for navigational calculations.

parameters.name: useUTC
parameters.description: true to use UTC time, false to use local time

name: useUTCTime
description: Property that controls whether UTC time is used for calculations.
returnDescription: true if UTC time is used
example: core.setStelProperty('NavStars.useUTCTime', true);

name: getStarsNumbers
description: Returns a list of Hipparcos catalog numbers for all stars in the current navigational stars set.

name: restoreDefaultConfiguration
description: Restores all Navigational Stars plugin settings to their default values.

name: loadConfiguration
description: Loads Navigational Stars plugin settings from the main configuration file.
example:
// Reload settings from config file
NavStars.loadConfiguration();

name: saveConfiguration
description: Saves the current Navigational Stars plugin settings to the main configuration file.

name: populateNavigationalStarsSet
description: Populates the navigational stars set with the stars from the currently selected set.

name: isPermittedObject
description: Checks if an object name is permitted for navigational information display (Sun, Moon, planets except Mercury, and navigational stars).
returnDescription: true if the object is permitted for navigational info
